role_summary: Central pipeline orchestrator that sequences, coordinates, and monitors the end-to-end execution lifecycle of the data processing workflow, managing control flow, stage metric collection, and final outcome reporting.
extracted_finding: The system enforces a strictly sequential four-stage processing lifecycle: (1) Introspection validates and assesses source files for size, language, and inferred purpose; (2) Extraction retrieves structured notes from valid inputs; (3) Aggregation consolidates notes into organized sections and tracks write success rates; (4) Derivation performs final analytical or computational transformations. Core business rules implement a fail-fast mechanism, automatically halting execution and returning a halted status if initial file validation fails or extraction yields zero results. The orchestrator aggregates quantitative performance metrics at each transition, logs progress to the console, and returns a standardized ExecutionSummary containing stage-specific statistics, completion status, and consolidated operational findings.
